test_cases.question: Does regular exercise improve cardiovascular health in adults?
retrieved_context: Multiple randomized controlled trials demonstrate cardiovascular benefits of exercise.

test_cases.question: Is smoking associated with lung cancer risk?
retrieved_context: Smoking is the leading cause of lung cancer accounting for 85% of cases.
